issue: keep_valid(values) is supposed to drop invalid configuration values and return only the acceptable ones, but it keeps every value it is handed. Blatantly invalid entries -- empty strings, values with non-digit characters, values with a leading zero -- all come back untouched instead of being filtered out. Each value is validated through a helper this module imports from another file (helpers.py); the filtering loop and the decision about whether to keep a value live here in main.py.
